title: Flashing Hearts
description: Replaces the half-heart texture with an animated heart
body: # | DESCRIPTION | Replaces the ![Half Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eb163185d7462822c27f1fb7d2c54339bcca0e8.png) icon, its effect and hardcore variants, and the ![Half Hunger Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8869373f8e89d087b399e4acac7ec2ab1975eb99.png) icon with an animated icon (![Flashing Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bbcaa7d198afaa96396b1f91e8714a09da9eaa2.gif) and variants). Removes the vanilla effect where lost hearts will flash in a brighter color when taking damage, because the half-heart animation is inconsistent with this animation. Does NOT remove the border shake or flash effect across every heart. # | VERSIONS | Currently supports Minecraft Java ```1.20.2-26.1```. # | COMPATIBILITY | Incompatible with any resource pack editing the heart or hunger textures or animations. May look confusing when paired with the Appleskin mod, which includes different features using the same animation. ## | Patreon | Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
